reviews.comment:
Buena atención. Muy surtido. Cosas ricas.
Lugar para sentarse y desayunar, almorzar, merendar o cenar.

(Translated by Google)
Great service. Wide selection. Delicious food.
A place to sit and have breakfast, lunch, an afternoon snack, or dinner.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURodnFUUmx3RRAB

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) A place that literally saves travelers on Route 3, where there's absolutely nothing for about 100km in each direction. As you know, the Patagonia region is known for its extreme winds reaching over 100km/h. The gas station attendant recommended a place with less wind to spend the night. It was super peaceful, and the place is well-organized and clean.

(Original)
Um lugar que literalmente salva o viajante que faz o trajeto pela ruta 3, a cerca de 100km para cada lado não existe absolutamente nada, e como sabem a região da Patagônia é conhecida pelos ventos extremos que chegam a mais de 100km/h, o frentista nos Indicou um lugar que tinha menos vento para passar a noite, foi super tranquilo e o local é bem organizado e limpo
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURobnZQOVdBEAE
